criteria.note: AxxonMcpRecognizerWrite dataclass has client_factory/config_factory/client/enabled fields. _gate returns {status:disabled} when enabled=False before any wire call (GatingTests.test_change_lists_disabled_without_approval confirms calls=[]); returns {status:gap} on wrong confirmation (test_change_lists_rejects_bad_confirmation). WRITE_APPROVE_ENV=AXXON_RECOGNIZER_WRITE_APPROVE, WRITE_CONFIRMATION=CONFIRM-recognizer-write confirmed in module constants.

recognizer_change_lists(added, changed, removed_ids, confirmation) builds ChangeListsRequest with added_lists/changed_lists/removed_list_ids; surfaces failed_lists from response. Empty payload returns {status:error} without wire call. ChangeListsTests cover payload shaping, failed_lists passthrough, and empty-payload error. Live round-trip confirmed in raw/live-verify.txt.

recognizer_change_items uses DT_Plate + data_string only. _item_packets never builds data_images or vector fields. EPS_LAST is set only on the final packet (confirmed by test_add_and_remove_packets_with_eps_last: last of 3 packets carries EPS_LAST). test_no_image_or_vector_bytes_in_any_request asserts HasField(data_images)=False for all packets. Response stream drained (empty iter on success).

recognizer_clear requires both confirmation=CONFIRM-recognizer-write AND clear_ack=CONFIRM-clear-node-wipe. test_clear_requires_second_ack: wrong clear_ack -> gap, calls=[]. test_clear_requires_primary_confirmation: wrong confirmation -> gap, calls=[]. test_clear_fires_with_both_tokens: both tokens -> status=cleared. Docstring says 'Irreversible and node-wide'; return payload includes warning='all lists and items on the node were deleted'.

register_recognizer_write_tools registers 4 tools (recognizer_write_connect_axxon_profile, recognizer_change_lists, recognizer_change_items, recognizer_clear). create_server has recognizer_write param; main() has --enable-recognizer-write flag (off by default), wires AxxonMcpRecognizerWrite(). Pattern matches existing phase registrations. Server import OK confirmed by command.

13 tests in test_axxon_mcp_recognizer_write.py all pass (GatingTests: 4, ChangeListsTests: 3, ChangeItemsTests: 3, ClearTests: 3). Full suite: Ran 718 tests OK. Phase-11 list_ids fix confirmed: axxon_mcp_recognizer.py list_recognizer_items() uses req_kwargs with no list_ids field; rg finds no list_ids reference in axxon_mcp_recognizer.py or server list_recognizer_items registration.

restamp dry-run reports 0 methods restamped (corpus already in sync). api_methods.json confirms ChangeLists=tested-pass, ChangeItems=tested-pass, Clear=tested-pass with evidence citations to raw/live-verify.txt. ChangeListsStream stays pending (no evidence field). live-verify.txt is sanitized: no host IP, password, or biometric data present.

notes: All 7 acceptance criteria pass. Commands run: import ok, 718 tests OK, 13 recognizer-write tests all OK, corpus restamp dry-run 0 methods restamped. Sanitization confirmed: live-verify.txt contains no credentials or biometric data.
